name: cua-toolkit
description: Autonomous desktop computer-use for AGNT, powered by the Cua Driver (trycua/cua). Lets agents see windows, read accessibility trees + screenshots, click elements by index, type text, and run a full autonomous goal loop - all in the background without stealing your cursor or focus. Self-contained: cua-setup action=ensure installs the driver + starts the daemon in one call, and every tool auto-starts the daemon on demand.
author: Annie (AGNT)

schema.title: Cua Setup & Doctor
schema.description: Install, verify, and manage the Cua Driver. ensure=ONE-CALL bootstrap (install if missing + start daemon + doctor) - run this first and you are done. Other actions: status, doctor (Session-0 check), install, serve, stop, version.

action.description: ensure=ONE-CALL bootstrap (install if missing + start daemon + doctor health/Session-0 probe); status=check install+daemon; doctor=full health; install=installer only; serve=start daemon; stop=stop daemon; version=print driver version.

confirm.description: Required true for ensure/install/serve/stop (may install software / change state).

schema.title: Cua List Windows
schema.description: Read-only. Enumerate all open desktop windows the driver can see, returning each window's pid, windowId, title, and app. Safe - no clicking. Auto-starts the daemon if it is down. Use a window's pid/windowId with cua-observe or cua-act.

filter.description: Optional case-insensitive substring to filter windows by title or app name (e.g. 'chrome', 'notepad').

schema.title: Cua Observe Window
schema.description: Read-only. Capture a window's state: accessibility tree (every interactive element with its index) plus an optional screenshot rendered inline. This is the 'see the screen' call that feeds the autonomous loop. No clicks performed. Auto-starts the daemon if down.

captureMode.description: som=tree+screenshot (default, best for reasoning); ax=tree only (cheap, no capture); vision=screenshot only (pixel-grounded).

showImage.description: If true and a screenshot was captured, render it inline in chat.

schema.title: Cua Input (Click / Type / Hotkey)
schema.description: Low-level primitive input on a real window. action=click clicks an element by its index (from cua-observe); type types text; hotkey presses a key combo; launch_app opens an app. Background dispatch - does NOT steal cursor/focus. Requires confirm=true.

action.description: click=click element index; type=type_text; hotkey=key combo; launch_app=open app by name/id.

elementIndex.description: Element index to click (action=click). Get it from cua-observe.

text.description: Text to type (action=type), key combo like 'ctrl+s' (action=hotkey), or app name/bundle id (action=launch_app).

confirm.description: Safety gate. Must be true to actually dispatch input to your desktop.

schema.title: Cua Autonomous Act
schema.description: High-level autonomous loop. Give a natural-language goal and a target window; the tool observes (tree+screenshot) and returns the current state plus a structured plan for the calling agent to drive the observe/reason/act/verify loop. maxSteps caps actions. dryRun returns the plan without executing. Requires confirm=true to execute real input.

goal.description: Natural-language objective, e.g. 'open the File menu and click Save As'.

dryRun.description: If true, return the observed state + planned first action WITHOUT executing (safe planning mode).

confirm.description: Safety gate. Must be true (and dryRun=false) to actually drive the desktop.
